subcodes.first_line: O Nazir! Upon thee be the Glory of God, His mercy and His bounty. Thou hast ever been remembered in the presence of this Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ناظر علیک بهاءالله و رحمته و عنایته لازال نزد مظلوم مذکور بود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @exhortations and counsels, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
